PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Bridges for Cynthia Savino.

There being no objections, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The bond is set at $746,120.00.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: J. Garrido.
